item.title: 非洲面食之都禁止进口面粉以保护新建工厂
item.description: 加纳在启用首家本土加工厂数日后，为防止走私行为，已禁止进口意大利面。【原文：Ghana has banned land imports of pasta to prevent smuggling, days after inaugurating its first domestic processing plant.】

item.title: 华尔街尾部风险对冲策略在冲突动荡市场中逆势上扬
item.description: 数月来，华尔街各种风险对冲策略几乎都在亏损。如今，随着伊朗战争引发的不确定性冲击市场最热门的交易，那些大量配置组合保护的投资者正获得回报。【原文：For months, Wall Street’s panoply of risk-hedging strategies did little but lose money. Now, as uncertainty sparked by the war with Iran hits the market’s most popular trades, investors that loaded up on portfolio protection are being rewarded.】

item.title: 委内瑞拉石油船运预订运往中国，美国制裁有所放松
item.description: 在美国能源大亨哈里·萨金特三世支持下，一家公司正着手将委内瑞拉原油出口至亚洲。随着美国制裁措施放宽，中东局势持续动荡，油价已飙升至每桶近100美元。【原文：A company backed by US energy magnate Harry Sargeant III has moved to export Venezuelan crude to Asia as US sanctions ease, with oil prices soaring to near $100 a barrel amid escalating turmoil in the Middle East.】

item.title: 苹果推迟智能家居显示屏发布，静待全新人工智能与Siri系统
item.description: 据知情人士透露，苹果公司的人工智能困境正对其产品规划产生连锁反应，迫使该公司将一款筹备已久的智能家居显示屏推迟至今年晚些时候发布。【原文：Apple Inc.’s artificial intelligence struggles are rippling through its product plans, forcing the company to delay a long-in-the-works smart home display until later this year, according to people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 人工智能初创公司ElevenLabs计划在两到三年内完成首次公开募股（IPO）准备工作
item.description: 人工智能语音初创企业ElevenLabs首席执行官马蒂·斯坦尼斯泽夫斯基表示，该公司计划在两到三年内做好首次公开募股的准备，这可能使其成为欧洲首批筹备IPO的人工智能公司之一。【原文：AI voice startup ElevenLabs plans to be ready for an initial public offering in two to three years, according to Chief Executive Officer Mati Staniszewski, potentially making it one of the first artificial intelligence companies started in Europe to prepare for an IPO.】

item.title: Meta与谷歌在成瘾诉讼中转向原告家庭生活
item.description: 在Meta Platforms公司和谷歌就社交媒体成瘾问题展开具有里程碑意义的庭审辩护之际，两家公司试图证明，提起诉讼的20岁原告所遭受的精神健康问题源于其家庭和校园生活的动荡。【原文：As Meta Platforms Inc. and Google start presenting their defense in a landmark trial over social media addiction, the companies are seeking to show the mental health struggles suffered by the 20-year-old who brought the case stemmed from turmoil in her family and school life.】

item.title: 芝加哥以8亿美元债券发售试探战后动荡的市政债券市场
item.description: 芝加哥即将测试市政债券市场，因中东战争颠覆了全球市场。【原文：Chicago is set to test the municipal bond market as war in the Middle East upends global markets.】

item.title: 趋势投资者首次将看涨美国原油的押注推至2021年以来最高水平
item.description: 算法交易者——这些以追逐趋势、加速价格动能著称的投机者——首次在四年多时间里将看涨美国原油的押注推至极限。这一举动可能为正遭受伊朗战争冲击的市场增添更多波动性。【原文：Algorithmic traders, the speculators known for riding trends and accelerating price momentum, have maxed out on bullish US oil bets for the first time in more than four years — a move that’s likely to add more volatility to a market being rocked by the war in Iran.】

item.title: 普京要求俄罗斯石油天然气企业利用高油价削减债务
item.description: 俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京敦促该国石油和天然气生产商利用大宗商品价格飙升的时机来减少债务，因为这种价格上涨将是暂时的。【原文：Russia’s President Vladimir Putin urged nation’s oil and gas producers to take advantage of sky-rocketing commodities prices to reduce their debt, because the spike will be temporary.】

item.title: 巴西国家石油公司维持国内油价不变，尽管油价因战争飙升
item.description: 巴西国家石油公司首席执行官玛格达·尚布里亚尔表示，尽管全球油市因战争因素暴涨，该公司仍暂缓上调巴西国内零售燃油价格。【原文：Petrobras is holding off on retail fuel price increases in Brazil despite the war-driven surge in global oil markets, said Chief Executive Officer Magda Chambriard.】

item.title: 遭重挫的IPO面临锁定期后"负反馈循环"
item.description: 普华永道美国上市业务负责人指出，2025年首次公开募股（IPO）企业中表现最差的几家公司正面临"负面反馈循环"的风险——随着财报发布后长期投资者和管理团队的售股限制解除，这些公司可能陷入困境。【原文：A handful of the worst performing companies in the IPO class of 2025 are staring down the risk of a “negative feedback loop” as selling restrictions for long-term investors and management teams are lifted after earnings, according to the head of PricewaterhouseCoopers’ US listing practice.】

item.title: OpenAI收购人工智能安全初创公司Promptfoo以保障人工智能代理安全
item.description: OpenAI已同意收购初创公司Promptfoo，该企业能帮助大型企业发现并修复人工智能模型在开发过程中的安全漏洞。此举旨在协助企业客户降低部署人工智能软件可能带来的风险。【原文：OpenAI has agreed to buy Promptfoo, a startup that enables large businesses to find and fix security issues in artificial intelligence models during their development, part of a push to help corporate customers reduce possible risks from deploying AI software.】

item.title: 油价持续攀升——特朗普在伊朗战争中的赌注也随之加码
item.description:
在油轮停止穿越中东之前，廉价燃料曾是美国经济的亮点。

【原文：

Cheap fuel had been a bright spot for the US economy before tankers stopped moving through the Middle East.

】

item.title: Citadel证券认为市场对美联储和欧洲央行利率路径的定价存在偏差
item.description: Citadel证券表示，投资者押注欧洲央行今年将加息而美联储降息的预期是错误的，并指出油价飙升使得这种政策分歧不太可能发生。【原文：Investors are wrong to bet the European Central Bank will raise interest rates this year while the Federal Reserve cuts, Citadel Securities said, arguing that the oil-price surge makes such policy divergence unlikely.】

item.title: 巴西五年首家IPO面临风险，伯克希尔·哈撒韦考虑推迟上市
item.description: 据知情人士透露，BRK Ambiental Participações公司此前已启动首次公开募股的初步讨论，但随着市场环境日益严峻，该公司正考虑推迟上市计划。【原文：BRK Ambiental Participações, which had begun early discussions for an initial public offering, is considering delaying its debut as market conditions grow more challenging, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 意大利财政部长乔尔杰蒂警告勿受加息诱惑
item.description: 意大利财政部长詹卡洛·乔尔杰蒂警告称，不应因中东冲突的余波而陷入加息的诱惑。【原文：Italian Finance Minister Giancarlo Giorgetti cautioned against the temptation to hike interest rates in response to fallout from the conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 英国上次能源救助计划的持续成本限制了里夫斯的政策选择
item.description: 雷切尔·里夫斯曾担任英国财政大臣，试图以财政纪律的承诺说服持怀疑态度的债券投资者。然而随着能源行业救助呼声日益高涨，这种纪律正面临最严峻的考验。【原文：Rachel Reeves has spent time as Britain’s Chancellor of the Exchequer seeking to win over skeptical bond investors with a message of fiscal discipline. Yet with the clamor for an energy bailout growing louder, that discipline faces its greatest test.】

item.title: 摩根大通看好蓝筹债券，称利差将收窄
item.description: 摩根大通公司已对美国投资级债券转为看涨，目前预计该类证券的利差将收窄12个基点——这与其11月的预测形成反转。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. has turned bullish on US investment-grade bonds and now expects spreads on the securities to tighten by 12 basis points — a reversal from its November projection.】

item.title: 高盛牵头的贷款方为Arclin债务损失做好准备，因需求降温
item.description: 高盛集团牵头的银团正为一笔债务交易的损失做准备，该交易曾为化工企业Arclin收购杜邦公司芳纶业务提供支持。由于投资者担忧行业波动性而退缩，这笔交易最终未能达成。【原文：A group of banks led by Goldman Sachs Group Inc. is bracing for losses on a debt deal backing chemical maker Arclin Inc.’s acquisition of DuPont de Nemours Inc.’s Aramids business after investors balked amid concerns about the industry’s volatility.】

item.title: 墨西哥贸易磋商倾向于微调《美墨加协定》而非大幅修订
item.description: 根据墨西哥政府主导的关键经济部门磋商结果，美墨加自由贸易协定不应进行重大重新谈判，而应加以完善和强化。【原文：The US-Mexico-Canada free trade deal shouldn’t undergo a major renegotiation but instead be improved and strengthened, according to consultations with key economic sectors overseen by the Mexican government.】

item.title: 人类主义组织就供应链风险标签起诉国防部
item.description: 人类中心主义PBC公司起诉国防部，指控该机构宣称这家人工智能巨头对美国供应链构成威胁。此前该公司与五角大楼就其技术是否会被用于大规模监控及完全自主武器系统存在争议。【原文：Anthropic PBC sued the Defense Department for declaring that the artificial intelligence giant posed a risk to the US supply chain, after a dispute with the Pentagon over whether the technology would be used for mass surveillance and fully autonomous weapons.】

item.title: 七国集团准备在必要时释放石油储备以支持供应
item.description: 七国集团财长表示，他们准备采取任何必要措施支持全球能源供应，包括释放战略石油储备。【原文：Group of Seven finance ministers said they were ready to take any steps needed to support global energy supply, including releasing strategic oil reserves.】

item.title: Strategy集团斥资13亿美元购入比特币，主要使用普通股进行交易
item.description: 迈克尔·赛勒的Strategy Inc.公司加速了比特币购买步伐，以近13亿美元的规模完成交易——这是七周来最大规模的购入——尽管此前承诺转向永续优先股，但该公司仍再次依赖普通股进行融资。【原文：Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. accelerated its Bitcoin buying with a nearly $1.3 billion purchase — the biggest in seven weeks — leaning again on its common stock despite earlier pledges to pivot to perpetual preferred shares.】

item.title: 华尔街银行为阿联酋员工提供临时搬迁选项
item.description: 随着对阿联酋的袭击持续发生，多家华尔街顶级银行正允许其驻该国员工暂时离境，转为远程办公。【原文：Many top Wall Street banks are allowing staff in the United Arab Emirates to temporarily leave the country and work remotely as attacks on the Gulf nation continue.】

item.title: 法国称七国集团尚未就释放石油储备达成共识
item.description: 七国集团在组织全球释放应急石油储备以应对伊朗战争方面"尚未达成共识"，当前担任轮值主席国的法国如是表示。【原文：The Group of Seven nations is “not there yet” in terms of organizing a global release of emergency oil inventories in response to the Iran war, according to France, which holds the current presidency.】

item.title: 梅赛德斯考虑与中国长城汽车共享南非工厂
item.description: 知情人士透露，梅赛德斯-奔驰集团正考虑与长城汽车共享其在南非的制造工厂，此举有望在美方贸易关税生效之际提升该工厂的运营可行性。【原文：Mercedes-Benz Group AG is considering sharing its manufacturing plant in South Africa with Great Wall Motor Co., a move that could boost the facility’s viability as US trade tariffs take effect, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 欧盟委员多姆布罗夫斯基斯称动用石油储备是可选方案
item.description: 欧盟经济事务专员瓦尔迪斯·东布罗夫斯基斯表示，在原油价格突破每桶100美元后，欧元区财长们将讨论联合释放石油储备的可能性。【原文：European Union Economy Commissioner Valdis Dombrovskis said euro-area finance chiefs will talk about a possible joint release of oil reserves after crude smashed through $100 a barrel.】

item.title: 特朗普家族的国防投资随着新无人机交易不断增长
item.description: 唐纳德·特朗普总统的长子们正投资一家新无人机公司，在五角大楼加大对无人飞行器系统投入之际，进一步拓展其国防投资组合。【原文：President Donald Trump’s eldest sons are investing in a new drone company, expanding their defense portfolio at a moment when the Pentagon is ramping up its own spending on unmanned aircraft systems.】

item.title: 葡萄牙足球联赛考虑出售媒体版权股权
item.description: 据知情人士透露，葡萄牙足球联赛已任命奥克维尔资本作为顾问，就出售旗下负责管理该国顶级足球联赛转播权及商业权益的部门股权事宜提供咨询。【原文：Liga Portugal has appointed Oakvale Capital to advise on a potential stake sale in the unit managing the company’s broadcasting and commercial rights in the country’s top two football divisions, according to a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 英国央行近十分之一员工将因节支计划离职
item.description: 为缓解英国央行紧张的财政压力，未来数月约8%的员工将离职。【原文：Around 8% of staff at the Bank of England will leave in the next few months as part of an effort to ease pressure on the bank’s strained finances.】
